description:
You are a professional home stager preparing the Contemporary House for a real estate listing in DreamPlan. Furnish three key living spaces with the following requirements:

- Living Room: Place at least a sofa (or sectional/loveseat) and a coffee table.
- Dining Room: Place a dining table and at least two chairs.
- Bedroom: Place a bed and at least one additional item (nightstand, dresser, wardrobe, or lamp).

Export a separate image of each furnished room to the following paths:
- Living room: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\staged_living_room.jpg
- Dining room: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\staged_dining_room.jpg
- Bedroom: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\staged_bedroom.jpg
